build.buildCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "frontend" ]; then cd app && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build; else yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn mcp:build; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "frontend" ]; then cd app && yarn preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT; else yarn mcp:serve; fi
